protocol.noSteps: No steps defined. Add the first task above.

sidebar.tip1: Use curly braces like {author} in the Title Pattern to auto-fill project names.
sidebar.tip2: Add "Custom" as an option in Dropdowns to let users type their own value.
sidebar.tip3: Toggle Hidden on fields you want to pre-fill logically but hide from users (advanced).

home.title: Automated Operations.
home.subtitle: Time Work turns your SOPs into executable protocols. When one step finishes, the next unlocks automatically.

features.title: Modern Operations
features.subtitle: Everything you need to ship projects faster, all in one place.

standardized.title: Impossible to Forget
standardized.desc: Complex workflows become simple checklists. Ensure quality without micromanagement.

dependencies.title: Auto-Unlock
dependencies.desc: Tasks remain locked until prerequisites are met. Prevents skipping steps.

parallel.title: Visual Progress
parallel.desc: See exactly where every project is stuck. Eliminate bottlenecks instantly.

automated.title: Automated Execution
automated.desc: Protocols run themselves. Just set the rules and watch it go.

sync.title: Real-time Sync
sync.desc: Changes propagate instantly across your team.

audit.title: Audit Trails
audit.desc: Track every action and record evidence with a click.

define.title: 1. Input Project
define.desc: Start a project from a protocol template.

execute.title: 2. Execute
execute.desc: Your team works on tasks according to the protocol order.

automate.title: 3. Deliver
automate.desc: System ensures quality gatekeepers are passed at every stage.

free.a: Time Work offers various plans depending on your organization size.

team.a: Absolutely. You can invite unlimited team members to your organization.

limit.a: Project limits depend on your organization plan.

footer.desc: The new standard for team operations.
